text:

Author: pi

Log:
  multimedia/mpv: 0.8.3 -> 0.9.1

  - Added CONFLICTS_BUILD variable to avoid ffmpeg build error
  - Cleanup Makefile (e.g. LIRC support was removed)

  ChangeLog
